info.name: Microsoft Azure redisEnterprise
info.description: REST API for managing Redis Enterprise resources in Azure.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Cache Operations

request.description: Lists all of the available REST API operations of the Microsoft.Cache provider.

response.name: Success. The response describes the list of operations.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Cache Locations Location Operationsstatus Operationid

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The region the operation is in.
(Required) The operation's unique identifier.

request.description: Gets the status of operation.

response.name: Success. The detailed status of the operation is in the response.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
